name: S1_first_byte
description: Return first char of argv[1] as exit code; if argc < 2, return 255.
io_hint: Derive the exit status purely from the provided input via a general rule. Do not special-case known values or consult environment/time/files; the mapping must be deterministic and solely input-driven. Guard missing/empty args with a separate usage path, not hard-coded outputs.
